titleStmt.title: SII 40.114: original edition by K. Munirathnam
No. 114. (A.R. No. B. 93 of 1930.) Kottapālem, Palnad Taluk, Guntur District, Andhra Pradesh.

summary.p: On a stone lying near the Śiva temple in the village.
This is dated Śaka 1131, Pramōdūta, Pushya, ba. 14, Saturday.

Records the grant of the village Ākarājupalli in Pallināḍu for offerings and worship in the temple of Tipurāntaka Mahādēva by Mahāpradhāni Talāṟi Prōla Bhīma-Nāyuḍu for the merit of his parents Dāma-Nāyaka and Kāmāsāni, and for the welfare of the king.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī śakavarṣaṁbulu 1131 gunē
ṁṭi pramōdūta samvatsara puṣya ba
hula 14 śanivāramuna śrīma
nmahā pratā(dhā)ni sakala lakṣmīpatiyaina ta
lāṟi prōlabhīmanāyuṁḍu tama
taṁḍri dāmanāyaṁkunakūnu tama
talli kāmāsānikinni dharmamugā gaṇapa
tidēva mahārājulaku rājyābhivri
ddhigā palināṁṭilōni Ākarāju palli
tripurāṁtaka mahādēvaraku haviba
li Arccanalaku Ācaṁdrārkaṁ . svadattāṁ pa
radattāṁ vvāyōharēti vasuṁddharāṁ
ṣaṣṭirvvaṣa sahasrāṇi . viṣṭhāyāṁ
jāyatē krimi . yī dharmuvunaku
vighnamu dalaṁcinavāru gaṁgaka
ṟuta vēyi gōvu kavilaṁ boḍcinā
ru .
Digital edition of SII 40.114 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
